title: Kline endpoint returns usable candles and indicators

assertions.name: OHLC relationship is valid
assertions.expr: isinstance(body, list) and all((c.get('high') is None or c.get('low') is None or c.get('open') is None or c.get('close') is None) or (c['high'] >= max(c['open'], c['close']) and c['low'] <= min(c['open'], c['close'])) for c in body)

assertions.name: at least one indicator field has values
assertions.expr: isinstance(body, list) and any(any(c.get(k) is not None for k in ['rsi', 'macd', 'ma20', 'sma7', 'ema7', 'bb_upper', 'atr']) for c in body)
